description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark exterior on the front and sides, contrasted by white paneling on the rear. The front features a double garage with a driveway, a car parked outside, and a fenced yard with a small lawn and pathway leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and additional green space, all enclosed by fencing. The roof is a combination of gable and hip styles, with dormer windows on the front upper level. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the front and sides, while the back has a more functional arrangement. The property includes a side driveway and a covered entryway, giving it a modern Colonial appearance.
description: A two-story modern Colonial house with a dark front, double garage, fenced yard, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. Symmetrical windows and a gable roof define its suburban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and fenced front yard with a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the driveway extending to the backyard, additional car, and a glimpse of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and white paneling on the house exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced yard, side lawn, and the covered pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front and sides, functional arrangement at rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered entry, and flanking windows, leading to a paved pathway and driveway
